data.question: Is right bundle branch block present on this ECG?, including incomplete and complete RBBB?
Does this ECG show right axis deviation, where the QRS axis is between 100 and 180 degrees?
In which of the following segments can you locate a QRS wave that would be used to calculate the QRS axis? The options below refer to time ranges on the ECG strip, provided in seconds.
For the selected segment, which range does the measured QRS axis fall into? The ranges are inclusive of the lower bound but exclusive of the upper bound.
Does lead V1 show a dominant R wave, where the amplitude of the positive deflection in the QRS complex is greater than the amplitude of the negative deflection?
In which of the following segments can you locate a QRS wave to measure the R amplitude in lead V1? The options below refer to time ranges on the ECG strip, provided in seconds.
For the selected segment, which range does the measured R amplitude fall into? The ranges are inclusive of the lower bound but exclusive of the upper bound.
